events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from UCSF Medical Center for client 1085. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: renal. Allergies: tree_nut, shellfish. Sodium ceiling 500 mg/meal, carbs 40–70 g/meal. Prefers American; dislikes lentils, beef. Cooking ability: microwave. 5 meals/week, zone Mission.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Grilled Chicken Garden Salad
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Turkey Meatloaf with Roasted Vegetables
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 39 g outside 40–70 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/500 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Baked Salmon with Quinoa
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 395/500 mg ✓, carbs 40 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Herb Roasted Chicken with Mashed Potatoes
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 430/500 mg ✓, carbs 43 g (target 40–70) ✓, no tree_nut/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1085 added to route R-MISS-1 (Mission), delivery 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1085: 5 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
